tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Operational queue with workflow actions
tickets.empty: No tickets match the current filters

review.title: Review Tickets
review.empty_pending: No tickets are waiting for review.
review.empty_reviewed: No tickets have been routed yet.

tickets.search: Search by code, title, or body. Filter and sort apply on top.
tickets.filters: Filter by status, priority, or sector. Visibility is enforced server-side — you only ever see tickets you're allowed to.
tickets.create: Create a new ticket. Internal users get an internal beneficiary; externals fill out the requester form.

monitor.tabs: Switch between global, distribution, sector, and personal views. Each tab is a different cut of the same data.
monitor.cache: Aggregates are memoised for 60 seconds — the second visit is instant.

admin.kpis: Active sessions counts users currently signed in (5-minute presence window).
admin.tabs: Manage users, sectors, configuration, and system health from the tabs below.

tour.language: Switch between English and Romanian here. Your choice is remembered.

errors.rate_limited: Too many requests, please slow down.
errors.permission_denied: You don't have permission to do that.
